text:
, better known by his stage name of is a Japanese voice and stage actor from Musashino, Tokyo. He is employed by Media Force. Mugihito was formerly credited under his birth name and also . He is the younger brother of Michie Terada. He voices Keel Lorenz.

A selection of other characters voiced by Mugihito

Basilisk as Tenkai Nankobo

Crest of the Stars as Sluf

Rurouni Kenshin as Shibata

Irresponsible Captain Tylor as Vice Admiral Mifune

Urusei Yatsura as Mendou's father

Mega Man X series as Sigma

Max Anarchy as Douglas Williamsburg

Yu-Gi-Oh! GX as Kagemaru
